name: Kosher Pickled Dill Tomatoes
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the white vinegar, water, garlic (peeled and sliced), and salt in a large pot. Heat to boiling.
2. Thoroughly wash and dry the green tomatoes.
3. Pack the tomatoes into hot, sterile jars, leaving 1/2 inch of headspace.
4. Add dill seeds and peppercorns to each jar.
5. Remove the garlic cloves from the vinegar mixture.
6. Pour the cooled vinegar mixture over the tomatoes, ensuring they are completely covered by at least 1/2 inch of liquid.
7. Seal the jars with lids and process in a boiling-water bath for 10 minutes. Makes 7 pints.
